channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: 'No-logs architecture and encryption are non-negotiable' — ExpressVPN joins the backlash against Canada's controversial Bill C-22
item.description: ExpressVPN has joined other VPN providers in criticizing Canada's proposed surveillance law, warning that it could undermine the digital security millions of users rely on.

item.title: Test du Nvidia DGX Spark (Dell) : le mini PC IA à 128 Go de RAM
item.description: Avec son DGX Spark, Nvidia propose un mini supercalculateur dédié au deep learning local. Dans un boîtier à peine plus gros qu'un Mac Mini, 128 Go de mémoire unifiée et une puce maison capable de faire tourner des modèles d'IA jusque-là réservés aux datacenters. On l'a testé dans sa version Dell Pro Max.

item.title: Google TV veut faire de votre télécommande une Wiimote
item.description: Google TV prépare le terrain pour des télécommandes à pointeur gyroscopique façon Wiimote. Le but est d'améliorer la navigation, mais aucun partenaire actuel ne semble concerné pour l'instant.

item.title: We tried Google’s AI glasses and they’re almost there
item.description: Google demoed prototype Android XR glasses that overlay Gemini-powered translation, navigation, and other information directly into your field of view.

item.title: Quand recharger son téléphone ? Nos astuces pour préserver la batterie
item.description: Il faut prendre soin de la batterie de votre smartphone. Voici donc quelques astuces détaillées à retenir pour avoir les bons réflexes et bien comprendre quand il faut recharger son téléphone.

item.title: LG’s 77-inch B5 OLED TV is down to $1,500 and comes with a $200 gift card
item.description: Best Buy’s Memorial Day sale includes a good deal on a massive OLED TV. The 77-inch LG B5 is down to $1,499.99 (originally $2,999.99), and the purchase includes a $200 Best Buy gift card. I’m a 55-inch TV kind of person, but if you’ve got the budget — and the wall space — this is […]

item.title: SpaceX va tenter un lancement sous haute tension avec la nouvelle version du Starship
item.description: SpaceX s'apprête à tenter, dans la nuit de vendredi à samedi, le douzième vol d'essai de son Starship. Un lancement doublement symbolique : premier décollage de l'année 2026 et baptême du feu de la version V3, une itération inédite du lanceur géant. Après plusieurs reports successifs, tous les...

item.title: Amazon retire 35 % sur ce kit de caméras qui filment en 4K, idéal pour surveiller votre cocon cet été
item.description: Si vous souhaitez pouvoir surveiller deux de vos pièces simultanément en votre absence, alors le pack contenant deux caméras de surveillance connectées Eufy E30 devrait vous convenir. En plus, Amazon le propose à 114,99 euros au lieu de 179,99 euros.

item.title: 5 essential features to look for when buying a new TV for the World Cup — from beating reflections to finding the right balance of value
item.description: Our TV experts explain what you should look for in a TV upgrade, and why they're so important to balance

item.title: Xiaomi humilie l’automobile allemande : son nouveau SUV électrique bat un record absolu sur le Nürburgring
item.description: Xiaomi vient de battre un record au tour sur le Nürburgring. Son SUV sportif YU7 GT a en effet ceinturé la boucle nord en un temps éclair. Il devient ainsi le SUV le plus rapide ayant jamais arpenté l’enfer vert.

item.title: Routers vs. Modems: What You Need to Get Online
item.description: Your modem and router are the dynamic duo you need to get online, so long as you don't mistake one for the other.

item.title: Prime Video has revealed the first trailer for The Boys prequel spin-off Vought Rising — and it already looks far more interesting than its parent show's divisive final season
item.description: Vought Rising's first teaser gives us a first tantalizing glimpse at The Boys franchise's superhero period piece.

item.title: 'I think those people are dead wrong': Jeff Bezos slams AI naysayers, plays down job fears for young workers, and defends billionaires and Trump
item.description: Amazon founder Jeff Bezos unsurprisingly thinks billionaires are doing a good job, and AI is pretty swell too.

item.title: Even If You Hate AI, You Will Use Google AI Search
item.description: The search giant’s AI-crafted answers are so convenient, you’ll be sucked in—to the detriment of the web and the artists and thinkers behind it.

item.title: Rivals season 2 episode 4 just hinted at the show's first lesbian romance — but I've already asked Hulu and Disney+ creators for more sapphic storylines
item.description: Blink and you'll miss it, but Rivals season 2 episode 4 just hinted at a future lesbian romance. However, I've taken a request for more right to the Hulu and Disney+ writer's room.

item.title: Passenger review — this predictable road trip horror movie crashes and burns
item.description: Passenger doesn't do enough to stand out amongst the abundance of horror movies in theaters this May.

item.title: 'Off the wishlist it comes': 007 First Light fans are requesting refunds after learning about Denuvo DRM addition ahead of launch
item.description: Denuvo is the talk of the town again among Steam users, as IO Interactive adds the controversial DRM to 007 First Light, days before its launch.

item.title: Luna Band : ce concurrent du Google Fitbit Air et de Whoop se refait une beauté pour son lancement
item.description: Présenté lors du CES de Las Vegas, le bracelet connecté Luna Band est désormais disponible avec un design revu et corrigé.

item.title: The Trump phone is not here
item.description: Where's the Trump phone? We're going to keep talking about it every week. We've reached out, as usual, to ask about the Trump phone's whereabouts. It's now been more than a week since Trump Mobile announced that phones would "start shipping this week." Last week Trump Mobile announced that the T1 Phone was ready to […]

item.title: Facebook lance discrètement une toute nouvelle application
item.description: Facebook a décidé de miser sur ses fameux groupes pour renforcer son activité. Meta a dévoilé une nouvelle application : Forum.

item.title: Ce solide laptop gamer Asus avec grand écran 18″ à 240 Hz et RTX 5070 voit son prix baisser de 600 €
item.description: Avec son grand écran bien fluide et son combo CPU-GPU puissant, l'Asus TUF Gaming A18 devrait convaincre les joueuses et les joueurs les plus exigeants. Y compris celles et ceux qui n'ont pas un budget illimité : actuellement, Asus propose ce PC portable en promotion à 1 699,99 euros au lieu de 2 299,99 euros.

item.title: Perplexity déploie une grosse mise à jour de Comet sur iPhone, voici les 8 nouveautés
item.description: Comet, le moteur de recherche dopé à l’IA de Perplexity, reçoit huit améliorations majeures sur iOS et iPadOS. Les utilisateurs peuvent notamment exploiter les numéros de téléphone sur les pages web et profiter d'une interface repensée sur iPad.

item.title: Trump Mobile confirms it exposed customers’ personal data, including phone numbers and home addresses
item.description: President Trump’s branded cell phone maker and cell provider said the exposure was linked to a third-party platform, and was evaluating whether it needs to notify customers.

item.title: The literary world isn’t prepared for AI
item.description: Since 2012, the British literary magazine Granta has published the regional winners of the annual Commonwealth Short Story Prize. This year, however, there was something off about one of the selections for the prestigious award: It appears to have been written by AI. Jamir Nazir's "The Serpent in the Grove" has many of the hallmarks […]

item.title: Meta quietly launches a new Reddit-like app called Forum
item.description: The company describes the app as a "dedicated space built for deeper discussions, real answers and communities you care about."

item.title: Why would you disrespect your favorite artist with an AI remix?
item.description: AI covers and remixes of songs are already a blight on the internet. Spotify, YouTube, TikTok, and Instagram are awash in flat reggae versions of "Smells Like Teen Spirit," dinky country renditions of The Weeknd, and monotonous Motown reimaginings of AC/DC. Now, a new tool from Spotify will make them even easier to generate and […]

item.title: Stephen Colbert’s ‘The Late Show’ ends after 11 seasons with surprises from Paul McCartney and others
item.description: Bryan Cranston, Paul Rudd, and Tim Meadows interrupted Colbert’s final monologue for the CBS show. Stephen Colbert chatted with Paul McCartney and joined him on stage for a raucous performance of “Hello, Goodbye” on the final broadcast of CBS’ “The Late Show” on Thursday night, a bittersweet farewell for a canceled show that still had a few barbs left for the network that ended its 33-year run.At the top of his last show, which grew more surreal and absurd as it went on, Colbert highlighted the “joy” that he and his team felt creating more than 1,800 episodes of “The Late Show.”“The energy tha...

item.title: “£400 for a fan? No thanks” – 8 products to keep you cool at work for less than £100
item.description: Stay cool in the coming heatwave for £200 less than a Dyson fan

item.title: These 21 U.S. cities suddenly became hot housing markets again
item.description: New listings and contract signings just hit their highest level in four years, signaling that America’s stuck housing market may finally be starting to move again. The housing market might finally start shaking off some dust after a few years stuck in a rut.

item.title: Smart ring maker Oura files to go public
item.description: The Finnish company said in September that it has sold 5.5 million smart rings to date.

item.title: Tesla recalls thousands of Model Ys at risk of… missing a sticker
item.description: The National Highway Traffic Safety Administration (NHTSA) has issued a recall for 14,575 Model Y vehicles over an issue that Tesla can't fix with its usual software update: a missing label. According to the recall report, Model Ys made between November 17th, 2024 and April 21st, 2026 could be missing a weight certification sticker due […]

item.title: Boots Riley turns class struggle into comedy with I Love Boosters
item.description: Before Boots Riley became the writer / director / musician behind Sorry to Bother You and I'm a Virgo, he was a young community organizer fighting for social justice as part of the Progressive Labor Party. Riley has channeled his anti-establishment, pro-worker politics into every piece of art that he's made. But his belief that […]

item.title: 7 new movies and TV shows to watch on Netflix, Prime Video, HBO Max, and more this weekend (May 22)
item.description: A new Netflix show from Stranger Things creators' and The Bride! lead this week's packed lined-up of new streaming releases.

item.title: The Mandalorian and Grogu is a lazy attempt at bringing TV to the big screen
item.description: The Mandalorian and Grogu can't quite leave its TV origins behind.

item.title: Spider-Noir review: Nicolas Cage rules in a Spider-Man story unlike any youve seen before
item.description: Nicolas Cage stars as a superpowered private investigator in "Spider-Noir," streaming May 27 on Prime Video.
